design_v: module and_gate(input wire a,input wire b,output wire y); assign y = a & b; endmodule
testbench_v: module tb_and_gate; reg a,b; wire y; and_gate dut(.a(a),.b(b),.y(y)); initial begin $dumpfile("wave.vcd"); $dumpvars(0,tb_and_gate); a=0;b=0;#10; a=0;b=1;#10; a=1;b=0;#10; a=1;b=1;#10; $finish; end endmodule
